hero.title: Casper Gutteling

about.title: About Casper Gutteling

body.1: Frontend developer with a strong foundation in modern web development and a continuous drive to improve. Experienced at an intermediate level in HTML and CSS, with a solid understanding of responsive design, clean layouts, and structured, maintainable code. Comfortable working within Scrum and Agile environments, contributing effectively to collaborative development processes.
body.2: Currently expanding technical knowledge by exploring Bootstrap for faster UI development, and diving into Arduino and C++ to broaden understanding of how software interacts with hardware. This cross-disciplinary curiosity strengthens problem-solving skills and technical perspective.
body.3: At a beginner level in PHP and JavaScript, with ongoing efforts to deepen practical experience and refine programming logic. Focused on building visually polished, user-friendly interfaces while steadily advancing toward more complex front-end and full-stack capabilities.
body.4: Driven by attention to detail, structured workflows, and the ambition to continuously grow as a developer.
body.5: This portfolio focuses on clarity, subtle animation, and strong fundamentals, making it easy to adapt to different projects and audiences.

about.focusValue: Frontend development, UI, accessibility, and performance.
